## Section 1: Business Rule Test Cases

One happy-path and one failure-path test case per approved business rule.

| TC-ID | BR-ID | Scenario | Given | When | Then | Priority | PHI |
|-------|-------|---------|-------|------|------|----------|-----|
| TC-BR-001-H | BR-017 | Valid input - When -FILE INDICATOR equals zero, branch to 'SKIP' | A valid transaction processed by HABADTE | The validation rule [BR-017] is evaluated: When -FILE INDICATOR equals zero, branch to 'SKIP' | Rule passes; processing continues to next step | P1 | No |
| TC-BR-001-F | BR-017 | Rule violation - When -FILE INDICATOR equals zero, branch to 'SKIP' | An invalid or boundary-breaching input to HABADTE | The validation rule [BR-017] is evaluated and the condition is NOT met | Rule fails; system returns error or routes to exception path | P1 | No |
| TC-BR-002-H | BR-018 | Valid input - When -FLAG INDICATOR equals void/voided, branch to 'SKIP' | A valid transaction processed by HABADTE | The filter rule [BR-018] is evaluated: When -FLAG INDICATOR equals void/voided, branch to 'SKIP' | Rule passes; processing continues to next step | P3 | No |
| TC-BR-002-F | BR-018 | Rule violation - When -FLAG INDICATOR equals void/voided, branch to 'SKIP' | An invalid or boundary-breaching input to HABADTE | The filter rule [BR-018] is evaluated and the condition is NOT met | Rule fails; system returns error or routes to exception path | P3 | No |
| TC-BR-003-H | BR-019 | Valid input - When -INPATIENT/OUTPATIENT FLAG equals outpatient, branch to | A valid transaction processed by HABADTE | The filter rule [BR-019] is evaluated: When -INPATIENT/OUTPATIENT FLAG equals outpatient, branch to | Rule passes; processing continues to next step | P3 | No |
| TC-BR-003-F | BR-019 | Rule violation - When -INPATIENT/OUTPATIENT FLAG equals outpatient, branch to | An invalid or boundary-breaching input to HABADTE | The filter rule [BR-019] is evaluated and the condition is NOT met | Rule fails; system returns error or routes to exception path | P3 | No |

---

## Notes for Test Execution

1. **AS400 Baseline:** Verify all BR tests against the original AS400 system first.
2. **PHI masking:** Section 4 requires synthetic test data - no real patient data.
3. **Boundary values:** Confirm exact threshold values with Mainframe SME.
4. **Low-confidence rules:** Require SME sign-off before test cases are authoritative.
5. **Missing source:** Test cases for MISSING_SOURCE components require manual design.
